data.title: Thirteen US troops killed, nearly four hundred wounded in Iran war, CENTCOM says | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: CENTCOM spokesman Tim Hawkins said 354 of those wounded have since returned to duty, with the US and Iran failing to reach a long-term agreement during recent talks in Pakistan.
data.keywords: Iran,iran us nuclear talks,US military,ceasefire,CENTCOM,Operation Epic Fury
